Jade Shard  
 


WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Jade Shard

WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Type:Combinable
Stackable:100

At one time, this item was used in DoN cultural before the revamp.

Dropped three times in Everfrost Keep in an hour or so.
QuoteReply
# Oct 04 2007 at 8:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591923873379
Scholar
319 posts
When I was a wee one, i wanted jade shards for Journeyman's Water of Growth, and they were hard to come by on a budget. I tried to solo mobs that dropped them, but maybe got one by the time I was ready for Expert augs. The best drop rate was on vendors. And here today, in an hour or so of killing gobbies as fast as I could kill them, I got three. So I would say it is a pretty common drop there. However, it is all moot. The old DON cultural recipes are out the window now.

# Mar 25 2007 at 9:28 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594571492519

I'm curious... any chance anyone ever try taking Jades and "combining" them in to Jade Shards? Like combining them in a forge with a hammer or something to smash them in to shards?

I've been farming all over and haven't been able to get any to drop, so now I'm wondering if there's an "undiscovered recipe" for these things.

▲ Page top
Mage Research
QuoteReply
# Jan 14 2007 at 6:36 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1599438061022
Scholar
145 posts
This item's original use was as Mage research component for level 20ish Fire Elemental. At each of the old tiers for pets ( every four levels), at least one of the mage pet spells had to be researched, and one of the components would be an uncommon drop off a mob, stuff like Ice of Velious and Pearl Shards.

Anyway, enough of the history lesson. These drops then, and I imagine now, will be random off of any low 20's mob in virtually any zone, so hunt where you like to hunt in low 20's ( or for DoN armor purposes, farm where you farm)and make sure level of mobs is low 20's and you will EVENTUALLY get some
▲ Page top
Pearl

I haven't found any in the wild but I have made a killing buying and selling them. Find them all the time on traders cheap (less than 100p) and always sell them for at least 425, usually in stacks of 5-15 at a time.

Jade Shards
QuoteReply
# Jan 06 2006 at 1:42 PM Rating: Decent
shadowsedge
Scholar
298 posts
This is a semi-random drop. I have noticed that is drops more often from level 25 to 35 mobs more than anything else. 400pp on BB each in the bazaar for a price today. One dropped for me from the gor taku in shadeweavers (the white alien things) and he was about level 28. Just like blue diamonds will not drop on a level 10 mobs I don't think these will drop on a too low level mob. So hunting PC might n When I hunt lions in NK, ice of velious, jade shards and lambent stones also drop so I generally hunt there if I need some.

Edited, Sat Jan 7 06:58:07 2006

▲ Page top
Goblin Chronicles of LOIO and Warsliks Wood
QuoteReply
# Dec 30 2005 at 9:50 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591848061553
View User Forum
122 posts
Ok since the search for jade shards has become a personal issue now (:)) After countless hours in the Lake of Ill Omen I have compiled the following on Goblins (which supposedly drop jade shards). Numbers in Parenthesis are kills.

Goblin Soothsayer: (27) 1 Idol of Woven Grass, 20 Green Goblin Skins, 4 Illegible Notes, 2 Greenscale Emeralds, 2 Koada'Dal Blood Dolls, A Tambourine of Rituals, Words of Absorption plus 10 other words (Karana, Cazic Thule, Cloudburst, etc.)
Goblin Warrior: (234) lol 8 Runes of Obsession, 80 Green Goblin Skins, 4 Flame Agates, 1 Jade, 2 Pearls, 1 Rune of Al'Kabor.
Goblin Agressor: (6) 7 Green Goblin Skins.
Goblin Pitfighter: (1) Goblin Sparring Gloves.
Goblin Messenger: (1) An Unfinished Note. (Note here: if one of the mobs runs he will go get the Messenger, this guy is yellow to a 37 Pally). Snare or Root.
Goblin BloodTracer: (6) 6 Tier'Dal Sooth Dolls, 1 Amber, 1 Part of Tasarin's Grimoire Pg. 26, 6 Tiny Glowing Skulls.
Grachnist the Destroyer: (2) 2 Iksar Scaled Gloves (Lore Item), 2 Goblin Slavers Whips.
Goblin Battlemaster: (35) 3 Goblin Bracers.
Goblin Scout: (3) 3 Goblin Scout Beads.
Goblin Witchdoctor: (3) 3 An Iksar Witch Dolls, 1 Bloodstone.
Goblin Watcher: (2) 2 Watcher Signal Torches, 1 Red Headband.
Goblin Warlord: (47) 45 Goblin Warlord Warbeads.
Goblin Spirit Caller: (27) Words of Possession, Allure, Recluse, etc. 3 Spirit Caller Beads.
Goblin Hextracer: (1) 1 Froglok Hex Doll, 1 Golden Earring.

Now notice none of these dropped a jade shard, but I have made over 150pp killing all these.

The only things I have seen that have ever dropped Jade Shards in these two zones have been one Charbone Skeleton in LOIO at Undead Ruins, and 2 off Skulking Beasts in Warsliks Wood.
▲ Page top

good lord these are rare.....
QuoteReply
# Dec 14 2005 at 10:28 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1674433028441
View User Forum
2 posts
Have been trying to farm these for a while (to equip alts with decent gear), and I have found a few spots where these things drop.

Seem to drop on the odd occasion from any of the gobbies in HHK basement.... though this is extremely rare. I was leveling from 20-30 on my cleric and got maybe 3 or 4 in the entire time.

Also the shardwurms in GD drop them... found that out trying to get the 2 cleric spells (celestial healing and improved invis vs undead) Had 3 or 4 drop in the space of a few hours.

I hope this information helps some of you in the same boat I'm in.... trying to equip alts without having to shell out the big bucks in the bazzy.

Meiglan -- 70 Half-Elf Ranger of Tunare - Drinal -
Cerillia -- 51 High-Elf Cleric of Tunare - Drinal -

QuoteReply
# Jul 19 2005 at 4:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593364817605
18 posts
i hope some of you are on the stromm server ! I need these for my cultural armor! I am a lvl 30+ driud and am trying to get my armor and weapons upgraded! I have had little success in finding good stuff in the bazar for anything resembling a fair price!!!
course if i want to spend 30 000 on a scimitar that hits less than what i have now but is unuseable to me until lvl 45 then i guess its a bargain! ( not!)
any help in locating these, supposedly, all over items would be wonderful since i have found only one in a month of looking and am getting tired of fighting green mobs !!! i want to advance!!!

drpepper@charter.net
▲ Page top
RE: jade shard not junk!!!
QuoteReply
# Jul 19 2005 at 9:54 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591778631293
Scholar
330 posts
Actually, if you are level 30 I would stop looking for Jade Shards and start thinking about the Expert level armor. It's only 5 levels more until you can wear it and it is much easier to come by due to the far better drop rates on components. By the time you find enough Jade Shards to make a suit you will proably have outgrown it.

For the expert symbols you will need Lambent Stones (common drop from a constantly farmed mob) and Fire Opals (vendor bought). You will need to look up the armor drop at EQTraders since they are race specific but it will probably be High Quality Cat Pelts.

Expert level leather armor is also often found for very reasonable prices in the Bazaar since it is a viable skill-up path for tailoring and has no tribute or vendor sell back value.
▲ Page top
RE: jade shard not junk!!!
QuoteReply
# Dec 31 2005 at 6:36 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591848061553
View User Forum
122 posts
Just wanted to add my two cents here on the topic of going ahead and thinking about expert armor. Well ok fine you can make the armor easy enough, but here is the issue: For me I am a Dwarven Paladin, to get the expert augment book you have to venture into Kedge Keep and kill mermaids, now I'm 38th right now and in kedge keep.. I can barely get in the door without being utterly whacked in here, but I have to kill 40 mermaids to get that book of patterns. So really whats worse, hunting for jade shards everywhere? or getting whacked on a constant basis trying to kill mermaids so you can get that expert level book? I see what you're saying, but right now for me its not possible, so I do try to find the jade shards (which I might add: after numerous complaints, flame mails, etc to EQ about the drop rate, still nothing lol). Most of us also like to complete all the quests and not just run and buy the things, its funner to do the tasks for me. If you ask me, the whole cultural armor thing was a major ***** up by EQ and was not well thought out. Really they should increase the drop rate. Thats enough ranting for me lol.
▲ Page top
Skulking brutes
QuoteReply
# Jul 13 2005 at 3:46 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591848061553
View User Forum
122 posts
Well while I was out searching for ivory for my Halfling Culture Armor, I was hunting Skulking Beasts. Well I finally got a jade shard to drop off of these :O. I wasn't expecting it at all, cause I just wanted the ivory. This is also a good place (Warsliks Wood) to get experience if you're level 24-30. I posted some tactics for Rangers and also some of there drop items on the skulking beast bestiary forum.
Jade shard used to make cultural symbols
Blessed Water of (deity) + Jade Shard in Jewelers Kit gives you Journeymans Blessed Water of (deity).
▲ Page top
Unrest drop these
QuoteReply
# Jun 24 2005 at 6:32 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591782878021
View User Forum
Scholar
38 posts
I have been hunting all the list zone and mob list above and never recieved one shard for a 3 night outing and killing over 300 mobs doing so. made 400p in process so thats a plus, but I went to unrest on a guildie hint and spent 1.5 hours and got two drop. :0 I am one happy BL now.
▲ Page top
Nothing particular
QuoteReply
# May 09 2005 at 6:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591778594804
10 posts
Seems these drop just about anywhere, off just about any lvl mob, they also seem to drop off of wyverns in CS, wish i had known their use when i had them, cause i sold a lot of em, seems their drop rate is a little better now, but with them being strewn about with the wind, good luck getting enough of these little buggers to make the new cultural symbols, just started that today, and only have 1 shard and 4 waters of karana, symbols seem to cost about 20pp to make, if you get the drops of these, or up depending on if you can find lots of these in the bazaar, so if anyone sees this, please let everyone know that jade shards are not worthless, but if they try selling the shards for tons of cash, expect journeyman symbol prices to skyrocket, but do please put these in bazaar, or check your local buyers there, i'm sure that someone would be interested
▲ Page top
